title: No Kill Effects
description: Removes kill effects: when you kill any mob or player, no death effects will appear. This is great for PvP.
body:
![No poof](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eafdffc0c83a83b9802935f20d7498710770dac9.jpeg)

**No Kill Effects is a lightweight Minecraft resource pack that removes the white death poof particles which normally appear whenever a mob or player dies.**

Instead of filling your screen with distracting puffs, death animations are now clean and minimal. Perfect for PvP servers, hardcore gameplay, or anyone who prefers a smoother visual experience.

**✨ Features**
- Works for all entities — mobs and players alike.
- Ultra-lightweight: no performance impact.
- Compatible across Minecraft 1.16 → 1.21+.

**📥 Installation**
- Download the .zip file.
- Place it into your resourcepacks folder:
- Windows: %appdata%/.minecraft/resourcepacks
- Mac: ~/Library/Application Support/minecraft/resourcepacks
- Linux: ~/.minecraft/resourcepacks
- Launch Minecraft → Options → Resource Packs → Enable No kill Effects.
